LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceBastion.label: dominion bastion fragment
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceBastion.description: A jagged fragment of dominion architecture, used to frame the slice as a shattered machine-temple rather than a copied void finale.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSpire.label: dominion spire
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSpire.description: A crown-spire of the dominion slice. It marks routes, breaks sight lines and reinforces the feeling of a hostile infernal processing chamber.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSigilPad.label: dominion sigil pad
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceSigilPad.description: A plated sigil dais used to mark entry, extraction, anchor and heart positions inside the dominion slice.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_Seal.label: seal anchor
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_Seal.description: A dominion anchor that holds the Crown-Heart under a shielding law. While any seal anchor remains, the heart rejects direct damage.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_Choir.label: choir anchor
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_Choir.descriptio: A dominion anchor that synchronizes the slice with hostile reinforcements. Left alone, it accelerates the rhythm of incoming support waves.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_Law.label: law anchor
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceAnchor_Law.description: A dominion anchor that sharpens the geometry of the slice itself. While it stands, the heart pulses become more punishing.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceHeart.label: crown-heart of the gate
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSliceHeart.description: The unique crown-heart embedded in the dominion slice. It is not a reused portal core: it is the revealed command-organ of the encounter, exposed only after the dominion anchors are destroyed.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSlicePerimeterWall.label: dominion perimeter wall
LanguageData.ABY_DominionSlicePerimeterWall.descripti: A dense dominion barrier segment fused into the slice boundary. It exists to deny escape through the map edge and hold the encounter inside the infernal machine-domain.
